Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment IS Granted. No opposition was filed and the settlement complies with Health and Safety Code 25249.7. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
